message: Production security group exposes 5432 to the internet.
recommendation: For production, expose only approved public entry points and keep service/database/admin ports private.

message: Production security group exposes 5432 to the internet.
recommendation: For production, expose only approved public entry points and keep service/database/admin ports private.

message: PostgreSQL port 5432 is open to the internet.
recommendation: Expose databases only on private networks and allow access from application security groups.

message: PostgreSQL port 5432 is open to the internet.
recommendation: Expose databases only on private networks and allow access from application security groups.

message: Inbound access is open to the internet across all ports.
recommendation: Restrict inbound access to required protocols, ports, and trusted source CIDRs.

message: RDP port 3389 is open to the internet.
recommendation: Restrict RDP to a VPN, privileged access gateway, or trusted administrator CIDR.

message: SSH port 22 is open to the internet.
recommendation: Restrict SSH to a VPN, bastion host, or trusted administrator CIDR.

message: SSH administration port 22 is open to the internet.
recommendation: Restrict administrative access to a VPN, privileged access gateway, or private bastion path.

message: RDP administration port 3389 is open to the internet.
recommendation: Restrict administrative access to a VPN, privileged access gateway, or private bastion path.

message: Outbound access is open to the internet across all ports.
recommendation: Restrict outbound access to required protocols, ports, and trusted destination CIDRs.
Remove duplicate rules to reduce policy noise and make reviews easier.
